title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft revealed seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (a reasoning model), Scout (an always-on work agent), and Majorana 2 (a quantum chip). The announcement positions Microsoft as a full-stack AI competitor to OpenAI and Google.
